basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Gandhinagar is recruiting for 1 Junior Research Fellow position on a temporary basis.

qualification.details: Consolidated Monthly Remuneration: | Rs. 23,213/- per month (Without GATE/NET) Rs. 36,000/- per month (With GATE/NET, including HRA) | House Rent Allowance: Rs. 5,000/- (With GATE/NET) | The successful candidate will assist in: | Synthesis and Biophysical characterization of peptides. Protein expression, purification, characterization and protein-based assays. Carrying out aggregation assays, inhibitor optimisation assays and spectroscopic/microscopic analysis. Organizing research data, managing databases, preparing reports and presentations. Maintaining documents and assisting with laboratory operations. Ensuring proper organization of the lab workspace.
qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate / Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course (B.Tech/M.Tech/B.Sc./M.Sc. or equivalent in Biotechnology/Biological Sciences/Biomedical Engineering/Chemistry or related disciplines) selected through National level examinations such as NET, GATE, or equivalent.

how_to_apply: Interested candidates can apply online through the official application portal.
Candidates must submit their application on or before 08th July 2026.
This is a temporary position initially for 6 months and extendable based on performance.
Remuneration differs based on qualification of GATE/NET.
Candidates must fulfill the eligibility criteria as per funding agency norms.
For any queries, contact: Prof. Sharad Gupta at [email protected]

content_sections.text: IIT Gandhinagar is recruiting for 1 Junior Research Fellow position on a temporary basis.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_gandhinag: Development and Validation of a Peptide-Based Screening Platform for Evaluating Anti-α-Synuclein Aggregation Interventions in Parkinson's Disease
Rs. 23,213/- (Without GATE/NET) Rs. 36,000/- (With GATE/NET, including HRA)
From date of joining to 6 months (Extendable)

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details
IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Consolidated Monthly Remuneration: Rs. 23,213/- per month (Without GATE/NET) Rs. 36,000/- per month (With GATE/NET, including HRA) House Rent Allowance: Rs. 5,000/- (With GATE/NET) The successful candidate will assist in: Synthesis and Biophysical characterization of peptides. Protein expression, purification, characterization and protein-based assays. Carrying out aggregation assays, inhibitor optimisation assays and spectroscopic/microscopic analysis. Organizing research data, managing databases, preparing reports and presentations. Maintaining documents and assisting with laboratory operations. Ensuring proper organization of the lab workspace.

rows.details: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate / Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course (B.Tech/M.Tech/B.Sc./M.Sc. or equivalent in Biotechnology/Biological Sciences/Biomedical Engineering/Chemistry or related disciplines) selected through National level examinations such as NET, GATE, or equivalent.
Prior experience with peptide synthesis, peptide biophysical characterization, protein expression, purification, characterization, and protein-based assays. Good communication skills.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Gandhinagar JRF Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates can apply online through the official application portal. Direct Application Link Candidates must submit their application on or before 08th July 2026. This is a temporary position initially for 6 months and extendable based on performance. Remuneration differs based on qualification of GATE/NET. Candidates must fulfill the eligibility criteria as per funding agency norms. For any queries, contact: Prof. Sharad Gupta at [email protected]

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Gandhinagar JRF 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application is 08th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Junior Research Fellow at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: Remuneration is Rs. 23,213/- (Without GATE/NET) and Rs. 36,000/- (With GATE/NET including HRA).

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for IIT Gandhinagar JRF in Biological Sciences?
faq.answer: Candidates must have PG Degree in Basic Science or Professional Course in Biotechnology, Biological Sciences, Biomedical Engg, Chemistry or related fields, qualified through NET/GATE or equivalent national exams.

faq.question: Q4. What is the duration of the JRF position at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: The initial duration is 6 months from the date of joining and is extendable.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Apply online via http://recruitment.iitgn.ac.in/projectstaff/ before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. What are the desirable skills for IIT Gandhinagar JRF?
faq.answer: Experience in peptide synthesis, protein expression & purification, biophysical characterization, and strong communication skills.

faq.question: Q7. Is GATE/NET qualification mandatory for IIT Gandhinagar JRF?
faq.answer: GATE/NET is not mandatory but candidates with these qualifications receive higher remuneration.

faq.question: Q8. Who is the Principal Investigator for this IIT Gandhinagar JRF project?
faq.answer: Prof. Sharad Gupta, Department of Biological Sciences and Engineering.

faq.question: Q9. What is the project title for IIT Gandhinagar JRF vacancy?
faq.answer: “Development and Validation of a Peptide-Based Screening Platform for Evaluating Anti-α-Synuclein Aggregation Interventions in Parkinson's Disease”.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for IIT Gandhinagar JRF Recruitment?
faq.answer: Refer to Advertisement No. SPON/63056/Advt2343 dated 01.07.2026 on the IIT Gandhinagar recruitment portal.
